---
name: Presentation or Talk
about: Create an issue for each conference talk, webinar, or presentation submitted or delivered
title: "[TALK]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

# Presentation - **<EVENT NAME>**

Link the call for submissions/event information below and check off each item when completed.
Add further details (for example review rounds or logistics) and break out into sub-issues where necessary.

## Main info
- [ ] Call for submissions/event information online
- [ ] Confirm scope and fit for this talk
- [ ] Submission portal/method:
- [ ] Submission deadline:
- [ ] Expected date for communication of outcome:
- [ ] Outcome received:
- [ ] Event date(s):
- [ ] Format (in-person/virtual/hybrid):
- [ ] Venue/platform:

## Submission materials
- [ ] Abstract/proposal drafted
- [ ] Abstract/proposal reviewed by <name/team>
- [ ] Submitted

## Documentation and ways of working
- [ ] Meeting notes:
- [ ] Comms channel:
- [ ] Main directory for drafting:

## Delivery
- [ ] Slides/materials prepared
- [ ] Slides/materials reviewed
- [ ] Talk delivered
- [ ] Recording/materials link added below:

## Follow-up
- [ ] Contacts made noted
- [ ] Leads added to CRM/onboarding
- [ ] Our briefing note or summary published (if applicable)
